title: Chamber Fix
description:
Make chamber vaults resetable with a configurable per player cooldown, like chamber spawners.

also fixes bug MC-273812, where the loot is always the same in a certain chest
body:
# ChamberFix

ChamberFix makes trial chamber vaults resetable with a configurable delay, it also fixes [MC-273812](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-273812)

## Commands (op required)

Set vault reset time, and save changes to the config

- /chamberfix set_reset_time <time> 

Reset vault manually for player(s)

- /chamberfix reset <x> <y> <z> <player(s)>
